title: Topstep's Golden Script: Celebrate Success with the ALEXGOLD Premiere
description: The curtain rises on Topstep's phenomenal celebration of funded trader Alex Ferreira's golden achievement, offering an exclusive $26 OFF and no activation fees.
seo_content:
Topstep $26 OFF ALEXGOLD Deal

Topstep is celebrating funded trader Alex Ferreira's golden achievement with an exclusive $26 OFF coupon using code ALEXGOLD, plus no activation fees on new accounts. This community-driven promotion honors a real funded trader milestone while passing the savings directly to new and returning Topstep traders. The combination of a cash discount and zero activation fees makes this a double-value proposition for anyone looking to start or restart a Topstep evaluation.

Topstep is one of the most established names in the futures and forex prop trading industry, with a track record spanning over a decade of funding traders and processing millions of dollars in payouts. The firm is known for its education-forward approach, strong trader community, and a challenge structure that emphasizes skill development alongside capital allocation. Alex Ferreira's golden achievement — celebrated with this promotion — exemplifies the real-world success stories that Topstep has built its brand upon.

With code ALEXGOLD, you receive $26 off any qualifying Topstep evaluation account, and the activation fee that is normally charged on account setup is waived entirely. The $26 cash discount is modest but meaningful on smaller account tiers, and the activation fee waiver adds additional upfront savings that make this promotion better than a simple percentage discount for traders who were going to pay activation costs regardless.

Topstep's trading conditions are well-documented and consistent: clear profit targets, defined trailing drawdown limits, no time limit on most program tiers, and access to a broad range of futures instruments. The firm's established payout track record and transparent rule set make it one of the safest first choices for traders entering the prop trading space for the first time.

To claim this deal before the April 1, 2026 expiry, visit Topstep via the affiliate link above, select your evaluation account, and apply code ALEXGOLD at checkout. The $26 discount and activation fee waiver will both be applied to your order. Review the current Topstep program lineup to find the account size and profit target combination that best fits your trading experience and goals.
